race.description: The Finch Engineering Grand Final Sprint Maiden Plate
race.comment: SHOWN THE DOOR (9) was lining up for just the second time last start when sixth over 1200m at Gold Coast. Should settle up near the speed. Major player based on that debut run. Follow up. IGOTMYMINDONYOU (2) is still a maiden after nine runs and despite that was well fancied last time but couldn't quite get over the line, finishing a close second over 1100m at Toowoomba. Comes down a level this time. Likely to feature. HE DA BOSS (1) fought on well for second last start over 1100m at Toowoomba, making it two minor placings in a row. Will appreciate the drop in grade. Sure to be competitive. VERY DEMURE (10) returns from a spell of nine weeks and is having her first run for a new yard. Finished eighth at Sunshine Coast over 1000m when first-up last time in work. In the mix.
